recommendations.title: Jesus
recommendations.overview: Three and a half years of Jesus' ministry, as told in the Gospel of Luke.

recommendations.title: Date and Switch
recommendations.overview: Two guys who make a pact to lose their virginity before prom find their friendship tested when one of them comes out of the closet.

recommendations.title: The Return
recommendations.overview: After the death of his father, a brilliant college student returns to his family home where he learns that the horrors from his childhood aren't as dead and gone as he once thought.

recommendations.title: Return of the Jedi

recommendations.title: Very Good Girls
recommendations.overview: Two New York City girls make a pact to lose their virginity during their first summer out of high school. When they both fall for the same street artist, the friends find their connection tested for the first time.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: Escape from Tomorrow
recommendations.genres: Horror, Fantasy, Comedy, Drama, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: In a world of fake castles and anthropomorphic rodents, an epic battle begins when an unemployed father's sanity is challenged by a chance encounter with two underage girls on holiday.

recommendations.title: The Empire Strikes Back
recommendations.overview: The epic saga continues as Luke Skywalker, in hopes of defeating the evil Galactic Empire, learns the ways of the Jedi from aging master Yoda. But Darth Vader is more determined than ever to capture Luke. Meanwhile, rebel leader Princess Leia, cocky

recommendations.title: 18 Year Old Virgin
recommendations.overview: In a series of sexual mishaps, a high school senior tries to lose her virginity on the last night before graduation.

recommendations.title: Paradise
recommendations.overview: A man sees the dark side of the time-manipulating biotech company he works for when a crushing debt forces his wife to give up 40 years of her own life.
